special_mechanics.name: Trampoline Bouncing
special_mechanics.description: Player bounces on trampolines in vertical passages. Trampolines break after 4 consecutive bounces by Mappy, indicated by color changes. Revert to original state once player lands on platform.

special_mechanics.name: Platform Veering
special_mechanics.description: Player can veer left or right while traveling upward on platforms or bouncing. Cannot change direction while falling.

special_mechanics.name: Fall Mechanics
special_mechanics.description: Running off platform edge causes fall into gap. Player bounces on trampoline if present below. Falling to bottom of screen without hitting trampoline results in death.

special_mechanics.name: Microwave Door Burst
special_mechanics.description: Flashing doors release horizontal microwave burst when opened by Mappy. Stuns and sweeps away cats. Only Mappy can open microwave doors.

tier_notes: Tier 3 - Qualitative data only. Wikipedia source provides gameplay mechanics but lacks precise physics parameters (velocities, acceleration values, gravity constants). Movement described through level design interactions: trampoline bouncing, directional veering, falling behavior, and platform navigation.
